--- layout: page title: Supporters image: "/assets/img/earth+emoji.jpg" menu: true order: 1 ---

Orbital Index was supported by our generous readers and sponsors. Here are some of our reader supporters:


  • Evan Maynard
  • Poops McGee
  • Marijan Smetko
  • Sam Anderson
  • Thomas Smyth
  • Thomas Paine, in memory of my grandfather Thomas O. Paine
  • Manuel Imboden
  • Galen Stevens
  • Samuel Trask
  • Bill Allen
  • David Rolling
  • Eliot Gillum
  • Dave Gallagher
  • Jesse Coffey
  • Lindy Elkins-Tanton
  • William Aaron
  • Brian
  • Frederic Jacobs
  • Michael Barton
  • John Frank
  • Austin Link
  • Ben Frank
  • Mike Curtis-Rouse
  • Matt Harbaugh
  • Dan Gluesenkamp
We also couldn’t have done it without generous corporate sponsors, listed here in order of first appearance:
  • Spaced Ventures
  • Xometry
  • Back to Space
  • Formlogic
  • Epsilon3 (our longest sponsor at 211 issues, right up to the end; thank you!)
  • First Resonance
  • Spire
  • A.I. Solutions
  • Elodin
  • AllSpice.io
  • CSC Leasing
